setup_help.subject: Setup Help - Let's Get You Started! 👋
setup_help.body:
Thanks for reaching out about setup!

Here are the resources that should get you going:

📚 **Full Setup Guide:** [link to setup guide]
🎥 **Video Tutorial:** [link to 10-min walkthrough]
💬 **Common Issues FAQ:** [link to FAQ]

If you get stuck on a specific step, just let me know and I'll help you through it!

Cheers,
The Concessa Obvius Team

newsletter.subject: Join Our Newsletter! 🔔
newsletter.body:
Thanks for wanting to stay in the loop!

We're building something awesome and I'd love to keep you updated:

✉️ **Subscribe Here:** [link to newsletter signup]

You'll get:
📧 Weekly tips & updates
🚀 Early access to new features
🎁 Exclusive member-only content

See you there!

Cheers,
The Concessa Obvius Team

product_inquiry.subject: Product Info & Pricing 🎯
product_inquiry.body:
Great question!

Here's everything you need to know about our product:

📦 **Full Product Overview:** [link]
💰 **Pricing & Plans:** [link]
✨ **Features Comparison:** [link]

To help you find the perfect fit, I'd love to know:
- What's your main use case?
- Rough budget range?
- Team size or scale?

Happy to answer any questions!

Cheers,
The Concessa Obvius Team

partnership.subject: Let's Explore a Partnership! 🤝
partnership.body:
Ooh, I love hearing partnership ideas!

For collaboration, sponsorship, or other business opportunities, let's take this conversation to email so we can dive deeper and move fast:

📧 **Email:** partnerships@concessa.com

When you reach out, please tell me:
- What kind of partnership you have in mind
- Your company/audience size
- What you think we could achieve together

Looking forward to exploring this!

Cheers,
The Concessa Obvius Team

default.subject: Thanks for Reaching Out! 👋
default.body:
Thanks for your message!

We read every DM and will get back to you soon with a thoughtful response.

In the meantime, check out our:
🌐 **Website:** [link]
📚 **Help Center:** [link]
📧 **Email:** support@concessa.com

Cheers,
The Concessa Obvius Team
